s1.subtitle: Expert cleaning, restoration and care for Oriental rugs, antique textiles and investment-grade carpets.

aboutSection.title: About Heirloom® Rug Cleaning
aboutSection.desc1: We provide cleaning and restoration services for Oriental rugs and investment textiles. We clean and protect all types of rugs, from simple synthetics to finely hand-knotted antiques.
aboutSection.desc2: We have worked for generations to perfect our process to ensure that your rugs look, feel and smell amazing when they are returned to your home. We even offer a Pet Satisfaction Guarantee for the removal of some stains, urine, and other pet odours. This is one of the most common reasons that customers request our comprehensive rug cleaning services.

items.i3: State of the art equipment & the biggest facility from here to Toronto
items.i5: Certified to clean even the most delicate rugs
items.i6: Drop off, pick up, & shipping options are available

petProof.title: Pet Proof Rug Padding
petProof.desc: One of the best ways to protect your rug is to have a quality rug pad underneath your rug. We work with one of the top rug pad manufacturers to offer you great options for high traffic, extra padding and protection for spills (or puppy accidents).

featuredServices.title: Area Rug Cleaning in Calgary, Okotoks, & De Winton

trust.label: Why Heirloom®
trust.title: A Legacy of Care & Craftsmanship
trust.description: For over five decades, Calgary families have trusted Heirloom® with their most treasured rugs. Our facility is the largest dedicated rug cleaning plant from here to Toronto.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Comprehensive Rug Care
services.subtitle: From routine cleaning to complex restoration, we handle every type of rug with the expertise it deserves.

cleaning.title: Rug Cleaning
cleaning.description: Full-immersion washing tailored to each rug's fiber, dye and construction. Safe for silk, wool, cotton and synthetics.

repair.title: Rug Repair & Restoration
repair.description: Expert reweaving, fringe repair, binding and patching to restore your rug's structural integrity and beauty.

stain.title: Stain & Odor Removal
stain.description: Advanced treatment for pet stains, wine, food and other stubborn marks. We eliminate odors at the source.

protection.title: Rug Protection
protection.description: Fiber protection treatments and custom-cut rug pads to extend the life of your investment.

appraisal.title: Rug Appraisal
appraisal.description: Professional evaluation of your rug's origin, age, condition and market value for insurance or estate purposes.

pickup.title: Pickup & Delivery
pickup.description: Complimentary pickup and delivery throughout Calgary, Okotoks and De Winton. Shipping available across Canada.

process.label: Our Process
process.title: How We Care for Your Rugs
process.subtitle: Every rug receives a personalized treatment plan based on its unique characteristics.

step1.title: Inspection & Assessment
step1.description: We examine fiber type, dye stability, construction and pre-existing conditions to create a custom cleaning plan.

step2.title: Dusting & Pre-Treatment
step2.description: Deep mechanical dusting removes embedded soil, followed by targeted pre-treatment of stains and problem areas.

step3.title: Full-Immersion Wash
step3.description: Your rug is gently washed using controlled water flow and pH-balanced solutions specific to its fiber type.

step4.title: Drying & Finishing
step4.description: Climate-controlled drying preserves shape and texture. Final grooming and inspection ensure flawless results.

t1.text: Heirloom brought our 80-year-old Persian rug back to life. The colors are vibrant again and it smells wonderful. Truly exceptional service.
t1.author: Margaret T.

t2.text: We've trusted Heirloom with our entire collection for over 15 years. Their attention to detail and care is unmatched in the city.
t2.author: David & Susan R.

t3.text: After our dog had an accident on our silk rug, we thought it was ruined. Heirloom removed every trace of stain and odor. Incredible work.
t3.author: Jennifer L.

cta.title: Ready to Restore Your Rug's Beauty?
cta.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation estimate. We offer complimentary pickup and delivery in the Calgary area.

hoursLocation.locationsDesc: We have two locations. Our Calgary drop-off centre and our main cleaning facility in Diamond Valley.

aboutUsPage.pageSubtitle: Family-owned specialists in fine rug cleaning, textile care, and industry-leading expertise.
aboutUsPage.introDesc1: At Heirloom® Rug Cleaning, we are a family business dedicated to the specialized washing, cleaning, and protection of fine Oriental rugs and collectible textiles. We combine time-honoured techniques with modern equipment to deliver the most thorough care possible for customers in Calgary and throughout Southern Alberta.
aboutUsPage.introDesc2: Most of us have grown up in this business, and that experience shapes the standard of care we bring to every rug.

greg.name: Greg
greg.bio1: Greg is a second-generation rug cleaner and the founder of Heirloom® Rug Cleaning. When he recognized that the industry lacked truly high-quality equipment, he set out to build it himself.
greg.bio2: He went on to found Centrum Force, where he began manufacturing premium rug-cleaning equipment and developing innovative machines that improved the process, making it more effective, efficient, and reliable.

gabriel.name: Gabriel
gabriel.bio1: Gabriel is a third-generation rug cleaner who has been involved in the trade since he could crawl. Over the years, he has learned from some of the world's leading rug-cleaning professionals and now helps his father, Greg, operate the family business.
gabriel.bio2: He is also often the voice customers hear when they call. Gabriel is committed to making sure every client receives attentive service and leaves fully satisfied with the care we provide.

brock.name: Brock
brock.bio1: Brock is also a third-generation rug cleaner. Like Gabriel, he has been learning about rugs and textile care since childhood. He handles much of the rug washing and brings a sharp eye for detail to every piece that comes through our facility.
brock.bio2: His focus is simple. Make sure every rug leaves looking its absolute best.

aboutUsPage.commitmentDesc: Together, we are committed to delivering the highest level of service possible, with craftsmanship, integrity, and genuine care behind every job.
aboutUsPage.leadershipDesc1: Heirloom® Rug Cleaning is also known across North America and overseas for its consulting services. We have helped other companies solve complex rug-cleaning challenges and outfit their facilities with modern rug-washing equipment designed to clean and protect antique, heirloom-quality area rugs from around the world.
aboutUsPage.leadershipDesc2: We have also played a role in developing revolutionary, state-of-the-art equipment for the rug-cleaning and protection industry. Heirloom® was the first company in Canada to have the unique Centrum Force® Synergy System. Only one other company in Canada has access to this exceptional equipment.

rugCleaningPage.pageSubtitle: Professional rug cleaning for Calgary and the surrounding area, with specialized care for fine rugs and luxury textiles.
rugCleaningPage.introTitle: Specialized Care for Your Finest Rugs
rugCleaningPage.intro1: At Heirloom® Rug Cleaning, we understand that your area rugs are more than floor coverings. They are carefully crafted works of art and valuable investments that can last for decades with proper care. Area rugs bring luxury, comfort, and beauty to a space, and proper maintenance helps preserve their appearance and longevity. That is why we provide professional cleaning services for area rugs and fine textiles in our state-of-the-art facility, serving Calgary and communities throughout Southern Alberta.
rugCleaningPage.intro2: Do-it-yourself home cleaning is often ineffective and can damage delicate fibres. Our expert process combines time-honoured craftsmanship with modern technology, using powerful yet gentle cleaning solutions to remove dirt, stains, and odours while protecting the integrity of your rug. For cleaning that meets a higher standard, trust the specialists at Heirloom® Rug Cleaning.
rugCleaningPage.intro3: No matter the type or age of your rug, our skilled technicians can help restore its beauty, freshness, and vibrancy. We care for delicate Oriental rugs, Persian rugs, and other fine textiles with meticulous attention, respecting their value and sentimental significance as though they were our own family heirlooms.
rugCleaningPage.intro4: Every rug is unique, which is why we tailor our cleaning approach to each rug's materials, dyes, and construction. This customized method helps preserve and, in some cases, restore colours, patterns, and intricate finishes while protecting your rug for years to come. With one of Canada's largest facilities dedicated to fine textile care and advanced cleaning equipment, we deliver thorough, effective, and dependable service.

craftsmanship.title: Expert Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.desc: Our process combines time-honoured craftsmanship with modern technology, using powerful yet gentle cleaning solutions to remove dirt, stains, and odours while protecting the integrity of your rug.

everyType.title: Every Rug Type
everyType.desc: We care for delicate Oriental rugs, Persian rugs, and other fine textiles with meticulous attention, respecting their value and sentimental significance as though they were our own family heirlooms.

tailored.title: Tailored Approach
tailored.desc: We tailor our cleaning approach to each rug's materials, dyes, and construction. With one of Canada's largest facilities dedicated to fine textile care, we deliver thorough and dependable service.

sanitize.title: When Should I Sanitize My Rug?
sanitize.desc: There are several situations where sanitizing your rug is especially important.

reasons.petDesc: Pet accidents can leave behind bacteria that are difficult to eliminate. Regular cleaning is not always enough to remove all contaminants, and if left untreated, bacteria can continue to grow, potentially causing odours, health concerns, and long-term damage to your rug.
reasons.moldDesc: Mold growth is another common issue that requires thorough sanitization. Like bacteria from pet stains, mold can persist and spread if it is not completely removed, creating potential health risks and causing further damage to the rug.

sanitize.closing: These are two of the most common reasons sanitizing is necessary. Each situation requires the proper technique and cleaning solution to ensure complete removal, protect the rug, and support a clean, healthy environment.

whyChoose.label: Why Choose Us
whyChoose.title: Why Choose Heirloom® Rug Cleaning?
whyChoose.desc: Heirloom® Rug Cleaning has been serving Canada since 1967, bringing decades of experience to every rug we care for. Our cleaning and repair specialists combine expert knowledge with state-of-the-art equipment and facilities to deliver exceptional results. From delicate hand-knotted Oriental rugs to complex cleaning challenges, we provide efficient, thorough, and dependable service designed to leave your rugs looking their absolute best.

rugPaddingPage.pageSubtitle: High-quality rug underlays for Calgary and the surrounding area, designed to improve safety, comfort, and long-term rug protection.
rugPaddingPage.introTitle: Protect, Comfort, and Extend the Life of Your Rugs
rugPaddingPage.intro1: There are many rug underlays on the market, but few match the safety, durability, and performance of a professionally selected rug pad. A quality underlay can extend a rug's life by as much as 40 percent by reducing friction, supporting the fibres, and helping it wear more evenly over time.

noLatex.title: 100% Latex-Free
noLatex.desc: Our rug pads contain no latex. Latex has been shown to contribute to floor damage and can be an allergen for some people and pets. We also offer shipping across Canada.

longerLife.title: Extends Rug Life by 40%
longerLife.desc: Most rugs don't truly wear out; they simply "ugly out." A proper underlay reduces noise, adds warmth, and makes your rug feel softer and more comfortable underfoot.

thickness.title: Two Thicknesses Available
thickness.desc: We offer our rug underlays in 1/8 inch and 3/16 inch thicknesses, so you can choose the right level of cushioning and protection for your rug and flooring type.

liquids.title: Protection from Liquids
liquids.desc: Rug underlays act as effective barriers against spills. They can help absorb moisture from water, coffee, or pet accidents before it reaches the floor, which is especially beneficial for wood and other sensitive flooring surfaces.

scratch.title: Scratch Prevention
scratch.desc: By creating a more secure grip between the rug and the floor, underlays help reduce slipping and movement. This minimizes friction, lowers the risk of rug wear and tearing, and helps prevent slips, trips, and falls caused by rugs shifting unexpectedly.

comfort.title: Added Comfort
comfort.desc: Underlays provide cushioning that makes rugs feel thicker, softer, and more comfortable underfoot. They also offer insulation, helping to keep floors warmer during the winter months.

noise.title: Less Noise, Longer Life
noise.desc: Underlays help absorb sound for a quieter environment, and by reducing movement and wear, they can significantly extend your rug's lifespan, reducing the need for repairs or premature replacement.

pets.label: Pet Protection
pets.title: What About If You Have Pets?
pets.desc1: Pets and area rugs can coexist in the same home. While maintaining rugs with pets can be challenging, the right cleaning routine and proper floor protection make a significant difference.

challenge.title: The Challenge
challenge.desc: Rug pads and underlays play an important role when pets return to the same favourite spots again and again. Older stains or lingering odours from past accidents can also cause ongoing issues if not properly addressed.

solution.title: Our Solution
solution.desc: Heirloom® Rug Cleaning offers pet-barrier protection for floors beneath rugs, along with professional rug cleaning to restore rugs to a fresh, vibrant condition. Our pet-proof rug pads help prevent accidents from reaching wood or other flooring below.

slippery.title: Slippery Floors
slippery.desc: A non-slip underlay helps protect both the rug and the floor underneath by reducing sliding, bunching, and shifting, which can lower the risk of trips and falls.

waterproof.title: Waterproof Protection
waterproof.desc: Waterproof underlays can be a smart choice for certain areas of the home. They help create a moisture barrier and are especially useful in spaces such as basements and laundry rooms.

honeycomb.title: Honeycombed Underlays
honeycomb.desc: Honeycombed styles are lightweight yet strong. They offer easy installation, enhanced stability, impact absorption, moisture control, and thermal insulation.

natural.title: Natural Materials
natural.desc: Underlays made from natural, recycled yarn are known for their durability. They also offer comfort, resistance to mold and mildew, and compatibility with heated floors.

whyUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyUs.title: Why Choose Heirloom® for Rug Underlays?
whyUs.desc: The area rug professionals at Heirloom® Rug Cleaning provide high-quality underlays for fine textiles across Canada. We offer nationwide shipping on our rug pads and are happy to help you choose the best option for your rug, flooring, and household needs. To learn more about our products and services, give us a call.

rugRepairPage.pageSubtitle: Expert restoration and protection for fine area rugs in Calgary and surrounding areas.
rugRepairPage.introTitle: Preserving the Beauty and Structure of Your Rugs
rugRepairPage.intro1: Heirloom® Rug Cleaning offers expert area rug repair and protection services in Calgary. From intricate patterns to fine handcrafted details, heirloom rugs are valuable, collectible pieces that deserve specialized care.
rugRepairPage.intro2: Our certified technicians are trained to clean, protect, and repair all types of area rugs, ensuring every piece receives the attention and expertise required to preserve its beauty, structure, and longevity.

types.label: Our Services
types.title: What Types of Repairs Do We Offer?
types.desc: To maintain the beauty and integrity of your area rug, regular inspections are essential. Addressing minor damage early can help prevent more serious wear and costly repairs down the road. Heirloom® Rug Cleaning offers a full range of professional rug care services, including:
types.closing: With proper care and timely service, your rug can continue to look its best for years to come.

fringe.title: Fringe Repair
fringe.desc: From minor repairs to complete fringe replacement, we restore both the appearance and structure of your rug.

serging.title: Serging & Binding
serging.desc: We reinforce and finish rug edges for improved durability and a clean, polished look.

patching.title: Patching & Reweaving
patching.desc: Holes, tears, and cuts are carefully repaired to restore the rug as seamlessly as possible.

backing.title: Backing Repair
backing.desc: We replace or secure backing on tufted rugs to improve stability and extend their lifespan.

colour.title: Colour Correction
colour.desc: Faded tones and discolouration are corrected to refresh the rug's overall appearance.

deepClean.title: Deep Cleaning
deepClean.desc: Embedded dirt, stains, and buildup are removed to help preserve your rug's beauty and value.

rugRepairPage.detailsTitle: Learn More About Our Repair Services

fringe.title: Fringe Repair
fringe.desc1: After a thorough inspection of your Oriental rug, we determine the most appropriate fringe repair method based on its construction and condition. For hand-knotted rugs, fringe repair involves carefully rewrapping the ends by hand. This detailed, time-intensive process requires close attention to the rug's original colours, structure, and craftsmanship to ensure an authentic restoration.
fringe.desc2: For machine-made rugs, power fringing is often the preferred solution. If your fringe requires complete replacement, we offer a wide selection of styles and materials to match your rug. If preferred, you can also remove the fringe entirely and choose a bound edge for a neat, modern look with added durability.

serging.title: Serging and Binding
serging.desc1: Serging, also known as binding, is an important finishing technique that enhances both the appearance and durability of your rug. For Oriental rugs, we use high-quality wool, cotton, or synthetic threads to protect the edges and prevent unravelling while maintaining the rug's original character.
serging.desc2: For tufted carpets turned into rugs, binding is typically preferred. This involves applying a narrow strip of fabric over the raw edges and securely stitching it in place to prevent the rug from coming apart. The result is a clean, polished finish that adds both strength and refinement to the rug.

patching.title: Patching and Reweaving
patching.desc1: Rug patching is often one of the most practical and cost-effective ways to repair Oriental and heirloom rugs. Addressing holes early is important. Prompt repairs help prevent further damage and reduce the need for extensive restoration later.
patching.desc2: When the rug is highly valuable or the damage is severe, reweaving is often the preferred solution. Skilled technicians rebuild the rug's foundation using new threads that closely match the original in both colour and texture. Each knot is recreated individually to match the original pattern, resulting in a repair that blends seamlessly.

backing.title: Backing Repair and Replacement
backing.desc1: Worn or deteriorating backings on tufted, hooked, or machine-made rugs should be replaced to properly protect and preserve the rug's structure. Installing a new backing extends your rug's life by reinforcing its foundation and keeping tufts, knots, fringe, and scrim securely in place.
backing.desc2: This added support improves durability and helps your rug maintain its shape, stability, and overall appearance for years to come.

backingReplace.label: Rug Maintenance
backingReplace.title: When Should I Replace My Rug's Backing?
backingReplace.desc: Here are two simple tests you can do at home to check if your rug's backing needs replacement.

test1.title: Check for Residue
test1.desc: Check underneath your rug. If you notice a powdery residue, it often indicates that the adhesive is breaking down and the backing needs replacement.

test2.title: The Pinch Test
test2.desc: Gently pinch the scrim backing. If it separates or pulls away easily, it is time for a replacement. If it still feels firm and intact, the backing likely still has some life left.

rugProtectionPage.pageSubtitle: Professional protection for fine rugs, carpets, and luxury textiles in Calgary and the surrounding areas.
rugProtectionPage.introTitle: Preserve the Beauty of Your Fine Textiles
rugProtectionPage.intro1: Applying a stain repellent is one of the smartest ways to protect your fine textiles and preserve their beauty for years to come. Stain-repellent treatments help safeguard valuable area rugs and can also be applied to wall-to-wall carpet, giving your entire space an added layer of protection.
rugProtectionPage.intro2: At Heirloom® Rug Cleaning, we apply specialized protection solutions safely and strategically to help make stains easier to remove while also discouraging pests. With decades of experience providing top-quality rug cleaning and protection services across Alberta, our team ensures your rugs receive the care they deserve.

whyProtect.label: Benefits
whyProtect.title: Why Protect Your Rugs?

stains.title: Prevents Permanent Stains
stains.desc: Helps protect against red wine, ketchup, juice, and other common spills.

cleanup.title: Allows Easier Cleanup
cleanup.desc: Spills bead on the surface instead of soaking in, giving you more time to respond.

dirt.title: Traps Dirt at the Surface
dirt.desc: Microscopic dirt particles stay closer to the surface, making routine cleaning easier.

colour.title: Preserves Colour
colour.desc: Helps maintain the rich, vibrant hues of your fine textiles for years to come.

odours.title: Guards Against Odours
odours.desc: Reduces the absorption of cooking, smoke, and other lingering smells.

whyProtect.closing: At Heirloom® Rug Cleaning, we understand the value of your area rugs and the importance of properly protecting them. That is why we rely on skilled professionals to handle every step of the process, including the precise application of stain repellent.

whyUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyUs.title: Why Choose Heirloom® for Rug Protection?
whyUs.desc: Heirloom® Rug Cleaning understands the value of your area rugs and your commitment to preserving them. That is why we employ highly skilled rug professionals and provide services designed to deliver exceptional care and long-lasting results. Our protection services include the expert application of rug protectors and stain repellents, forming an essential part of our complete rug care and maintenance offering.

bleachSpotPage.pageSubtitle: Specialized colour restoration and carpet dyeing for Calgary and the surrounding area.
bleachSpotPage.intro1: A clean carpet helps your home look its best, but cleanliness is only part of the picture. If the colour has faded, or if a spill has stripped away the dye, your carpet may no longer reflect its original beauty.
bleachSpotPage.intro2: In these cases, regular cleaning is not always enough. It takes specialized colour restoration to bring it back. If your carpet is no longer as rich, elegant, or vibrant as it once was, Heirloom® Rug Cleaning can help restore its appearance with professional carpet dyeing services.

whyDyeing.title: Why Choose Carpet Dyeing Over Replacement?
whyDyeing.desc: When it comes to bleach stains and colour loss, carpet dyeing is often the smartest solution. Instead of cutting out damaged sections, we carefully match the surrounding colour so the repair blends naturally. In many cases, dyeing is far more cost-effective than full replacement, and the results can make damaged areas virtually disappear.
whyDyeing.closing: The goal is simple. Restore your carpet so it looks natural, consistent, and as though the damage never happened in the first place.

diy.title: Could I Do This Myself?
diy.desc1: Carpet dyeing is not as simple as adding colour. It is a highly specialized process that requires the right techniques, tools, and professional-grade materials. Without the proper knowledge, do-it-yourself attempts can lead to uneven colour, poor blending, or permanent damage.
diy.desc2: Professional technicians have the training, equipment, and colour-matching expertise needed to complete the work properly and efficiently, so you can feel confident the repair will blend as seamlessly as possible.

overdye.label: Advanced Technique
overdye.title: Overdyeing
overdye.desc1: Overdyeing is an effective way to revive your carpet and restore rich, even colour throughout the surface. Faded areas and visible stains can be blended away, leaving the carpet looking refreshed, vibrant, and renewed.
overdye.desc2: Because the process restores the appearance rather than replacing the material, overdyeing can help you avoid the cost of new carpet while extending the life of what you already have.
overdye.desc3: Overdyeing is also an eco-conscious option. By restoring rather than replacing, you reduce waste and support a healthier indoor environment.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: What Dye Services Do We Offer?

restoration.title: Carpet Restoration
restoration.desc: Restore your carpet's original beauty and value with advanced professional techniques designed to refresh and revitalize its appearance.

colourRepair.title: Carpet Colour Repair
colourRepair.desc: Our expert colour repair service is a cost-effective way to preserve your carpet's appearance while extending its lifespan.

bleachSpot.title: Carpet Bleach Spot Repair
bleachSpot.desc: An efficient and affordable solution that corrects bleach damage without the need for costly carpet replacement.

recolouring.title: Faded Carpet Recolouring
recolouring.desc: Whether your carpet has faded from spills, sunlight, or everyday wear, we can restore rich, even colour and bring it back to life.
